## 📋 Bug Description

_Give a clear and concise description of what the bug is. What did you see? When does it happen?_


---

## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce

_Tell us exactly how to trigger the bug so we can reproduce it on our end._

1. 
2. 
3.

## ✅ Expected Behavior

_What should have happened instead?_


## ❌ Actual Behavior

_What actually happened? Be as specific as possible._


---

## 💻 System Information

_Fill in all the fields below. This helps us narrow down the cause quickly._

| Field                          | Value               |
|--------------------------------|---------------------|
| Bar Enhanced Version           |                     |
| GNOME Shell Version            |                     |
| Linux Distribution & Version   |                     |
| Display Server                 | X11 / Wayland       |
| Other Extensions (if any)      |                     |

---

## 🖼️ Visual Evidence

_Screenshots or screen recordings are very helpful, especially for visual bugs or extension conflicts. Drag and drop them directly here._


---

## 📜 Error Logs & Stack Trace

_If the extension is crashing or failing to load, please provide the logs below._
_Run this command in your terminal **before** reproducing the bug:_

```
SHELL_DEBUG=all journalctl /usr/bin/{gjs,gnome-shell} -fo cat
```

_If the extension won't even enable, uninstall it first, run the command, then reinstall it while the command is still running._

<details>
<summary>Click to expand logs</summary>

```
Paste your logs here
```

</details>

---

## 💡 Additional Context

_Anything else we should know? Does it happen only on certain setups, after a specific update, or under particular conditions?_
